package rulefixtures

// scenario for nested_append_without_outer_capacity: Append calls inside nested loops without visible preallocation on the outer slice.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule357NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario357Negative(records []Rule357NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
